name: CreateShipmentLineItem
description: CreateShipmentLineItem schema from Public API (Otter Public API).

id.description: A CSS SKU UUID for the product. One of id, slug or externalId is required.

slug.description: A CSS SKU slug for the product. One of id, slug or externalId is required.

externalId.description: A SKU external ID for the product. One of id, slug or externalId is required.

manifestQuantity.description: The expected quantity of the product in the shipment.

receivedSellableQuantity.description: The quantity of the product in the shipment received that was sellable.

receivedUnsellableQuantity.description: The quantity of the product in the shipment received that was unsellable (damaged, expired, etc.).
